sections.title: 1. Data controller
paragraphs: The controller for personal data processed through LocalTools is Francisco Rodríguez. Privacy and data-rights contact: fran11799@outlook.com.

sections.title: 2. Local tools and browser data
paragraphs: Text, files, and other content entered into the tools are processed locally in the browser and are not uploaded to a LocalTools server.

The browser stores functional preferences in localStorage, including language, theme, density, selected tool, and recent or saved colors. This information stays on the device and is not used for analytics, advertising, cross-site tracking, or profiling.

sections.title: 3. Email subscription
paragraphs: Subscription is optional and uses double opt-in. A request processes the email address, locale, form source, consent date and version, IP address, user-agent, subscription status, timestamps, and hashes of verification and unsubscribe tokens.
These data are used to send confirmation, communicate relevant LocalTools updates, demonstrate consent, secure the service, and process unsubscribe requests.

sections.title: 4. Legal basis
paragraphs: Update emails rely on explicit consent. Consent can be withdrawn at any time without affecting processing performed before withdrawal.
Data strictly required for security, abuse prevention, consent evidence, or legal obligations may be processed under legitimate interests or legal compliance, as applicable.

sections.title: 5. Providers and recipients
paragraphs: The website is hosted by Vercel. Subscriptions are handled through the codebyfran.es bridge, Supabase database infrastructure, and the configured email transport provider. These providers process only the data needed to provide their services.
We do not sell personal data or share it for advertising. External links are governed by their own policies.

sections.title: 6. Retention
paragraphs: Active subscription data are retained while the subscription remains active. Pending and unsubscribed records and related evidence are kept only as long as needed to confirm requests, honour opt-outs, handle claims, and meet obligations; they are then deleted or anonymised where appropriate.

sections.title: 7. Cookies and local storage
paragraphs: LocalTools does not use analytics, advertising, or tracking cookies and currently installs no non-essential cookies.

The functional local storage described here is used only to remember interface choices or data the user chooses to save. No consent banner is therefore displayed. This decision will be reviewed before adding analytics, advertising, tracking embeds, or storage for unrelated purposes.

sections.title: 8. Your rights
items: Request access, correction, erasure, restriction, objection, and portability where applicable.
Withdraw consent through the unsubscribe link in every email or by contacting fran11799@outlook.com.
Lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (www.aepd.es).

sections.title: 9. Security
paragraphs: We use reasonable technical and organisational safeguards, including single-purpose tokens stored as hashes, input validation, and request limits. No Internet-connected system can guarantee absolute security.

sections.title: 10. Policy changes
paragraphs: We may update this policy for technical or legal reasons. The current version is always published with its update date.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance
paragraphs: By using LocalTools you accept these terms. If you disagree, stop using the site.

sections.title: 2. Permitted use
items: Personal or professional use of browser-based tools.
Illegal use, abusive automation, and unauthorised access attempts are prohibited.

sections.title: 3. Update subscription
paragraphs: Subscription is voluntary, requires email confirmation through double opt-in, and may cover new tools, features, relevant UX improvements, and important website changes.
No delivery frequency is guaranteed. You may withdraw consent free of charge at any time through the unsubscribe link included in every message.

sections.title: 4. User-submitted content
paragraphs: If you submit suggestions or feedback, you confirm that you have the right to share that content. Data entered into local tools are not sent to LocalTools.

sections.title: 5. Third-party links
paragraphs: We do not control linked external sites and do not guarantee their availability, content, or security.

sections.title: 6. Security and availability
paragraphs: We apply reasonable safeguards but do not guarantee uninterrupted availability, error-free operation, or compatibility with every device or format.

sections.title: 7. Warranty disclaimer
paragraphs: The service is provided as is and as available, within the limits of applicable law. Review outputs before using them in critical contexts.

sections.title: 8. Service changes
paragraphs: We may change features or these terms. The current version is published with its update date.

sections.title: 9. Governing law and contact
paragraphs: These terms are interpreted under Spanish law and applicable mandatory rules. Contact: Francisco Rodríguez, fran11799@outlook.com.
